title: Protocol to generate murine organotypic brain cultures for drug screening and evaluation of anti-metastatic efficacy
author: Zhu, Lucia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Organotypic brain cultures are short-term assays that phenotypically and functionally recapitulate brain metastatic cells  in vivo . Here, we present a protocol to generate murine organotypic brain cultures for drug screening. We describe steps for sectioning of murine brains and plating of organotypic cultures. We then detail evaluation of the anti-metastatic effect of chemical compounds through bioluminescence imaging before and after drug treatment. Combined with downstream applications, this protocol allows comprehensive characterizations of both cancer cells and the tumor-associated microenvironment.
